# Popover

A popover component for displaying rich content in a floating panel anchored to a trigger element, similar to a tooltip but with interactive content.

## Import

```jsx
import { Popover } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Popover` | The root component that manages popover state. |
| `Popover.Trigger` | The element that toggles the popover on click. |
| `Popover.Content` | The floating panel containing popover content. |
| `Popover.Arrow` | An arrow pointing from the popover to the trigger. |
| `Popover.Header` | The header section of the popover. |
| `Popover.Body` | The main content area of the popover. |
| `Popover.Footer` | The footer section of the popover. |
| `Popover.Title` | The title of the popover. |
| `Popover.Description` | A description text within the popover. |
| `Popover.CloseTrigger` | A button to close the popover. |

## Props

### Popover

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `open` | `boolean` | - | Controlled open state of the popover. |
| `onOpenChange` | `(details: { open: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the open state changes. |
| `positioning` | `object` | - | Positioning options (e.g., `{ placement: "bottom" }`). |
| `closeOnInteractOutside` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the popover closes when clicking outside. |

## Usage

### Basic Popover

```jsx
<Popover>
  <Popover.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Popover</Button>
  </Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>
    <Popover.Arrow />
    <Popover.Header>
      <Popover.Title>Popover Title</Popover.Title>
    </Popover.Header>
    <Popover.Body>
      <p>This is the popover content.</p>
    </Popover.Body>
  </Popover.Content>
</Popover>
```

### Popover with Footer Actions

```jsx
<Popover>
  <Popover.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Confirm</Button>
  </Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>
    <Popover.Arrow />
    <Popover.Body>
      <Popover.Title>Are you sure?</Popover.Title>
      <Popover.Description>This action cannot be undone.</Popover.Description>
    </Popover.Body>
    <Popover.Footer>
      <Popover.CloseTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Cancel</Button>
      </Popover.CloseTrigger>
      <Button size="sm" colorPalette="red">Delete</Button>
    </Popover.Footer>
  </Popover.Content>
</Popover>
```

### Controlled Popover

```jsx
function ControlledPopover() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={(e) => setOpen(e.open)}>
      <Popover.Trigger asChild>
        <Button>Toggle</Button>
      </Popover.Trigger>
      <Popover.Content>
        <Popover.Arrow />
        <Popover.Body>Controlled popover content.</Popover.Body>
      </Popover.Content>
    </Popover>
  );
}
```
